description: The only Go-native, agent-native, MCP-exposed UK rail CLI; live boards, journey planning, and a local SQLite store that remembers your commute.

novel_features.name: Saved-commute one-shot
novel_features.description: Run a saved commute in one keystroke; resolves origin, destination, and time-window from the local store.

novel_features.name: Offline station search
novel_features.description: FTS5 search over the local UK CRS code table; resolves Paddington -> PAD with no network call.

novel_features.name: Saved-routes morning status
novel_features.description: Fans out across every saved route and prints a single ranked status table for all your commutes.

novel_features.name: Service delay-reason briefing
novel_features.description: Combines GetServiceDetails delay/cancel reasons with adjacent operator alerts into one screen explaining what is going wrong with one service.

novel_features.name: Disruption-aware journey ranking
novel_features.description: Ranks A->B options by combined scheduled-time, current delay, and platform-known signal so on-time-but-later beats earlier-but-late.

novel_features.name: Recent-journey replay
novel_features.description: Re-runs your recent A->B searches with fresh live data, side-by-side, so iterative trip planning is one keystroke per refresh.

novel_features.name: Multi-origin board fan-out
novel_features.description: Accept a comma-separated list of CRS codes and merge departures across all of them into one ranked time-ordered list.

novel_features.name: Eval-grader 9th quality gate
novel_features.description: Programmatic eval grader that scores an LLM agent against a fixture suite of natural-language UK-rail prompts; 80% pass-rate threshold blocks ship.
